text:
locate the information you need, please contact ResDAC.
| SAS Name | Variable Name | 
|---|---|
| MODEL_ID | Model Identifier | 
| ENTITY_ID | Entity Identifier | 
| BENE_ID | Encrypted CCW Beneficiary ID | 
| START_DATE | Beneficiary Start Date | 
| END_DATE | Beneficiary End Date | 
| VLNTRY_IND | Voluntary Alignment Indicator |
